title: Modrinthmination 2023
description: The first 20 pages of Fabric 1.20.2 mods on Modrinth* wrenched together into a modpack.
body:
Ever wondered what a modpack with about 370 completely unrelated mods could look like? No?? Too bad, here it is anyway!

Here's how this was made:

- I took Simply Optimized for 1.20.2...
- downloaded ALL (except things like Essential) MODS from the first 20 pages of Fabric 1.20.2 mods on Modrinth into the same instance...
- spent like an hour resolving incompatibilities (that was a lot of fun), removing mods with offsite dependencies and otherwise incompatible mods how I saw fit, until the instance could load into a world...
- $$$

### Features:

- Not Enough Crashes
- LibJF
- 3 minimap mods
- Multiple info overlays
- Multiple zoom mods
- Over 6 config libraries
- uhh a lot more mods that do the same thing

**Requires ~3.5 GB memory to run (5 GB recommended)**
